## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- The use case first, not the proposed feature. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- The shape of what you'd like to see. Doesn't have to be detailed —
the discussion will refine it. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short. -->

## Scope check

Trail deliberately stays inside a small box:

- Anthropic-native primitives (Claude Code subagents, Skills, slash
  commands, MCP). Not LangGraph / CrewAI / etc.
- Plane as the ticket bus. Not JIRA, not Linear, not GitHub Issues.
- Human-triggered turns only. No ticket-driven autopilot.
- Description-once + comment-only handover.

If the proposal sits inside that box, great — describe it.
If it sits outside it, please make the case for why it still belongs.
